zh.Henbury cum Pexall, Macclesfield, Cheshi: 英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Bostock於1270年出生在英國爾時，他的父親Edward Phillip De Bostock27歲，母親Maria de Vernon32歲。他於1305年與Joan De Brereton在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1310年在英國英格蘭爾諾維其被列為purveyor for the king。他去世於1338年在英國爾保斯托享年68歲。

zh-hans.Henbury cum Pexall, Macclesfield, Cheshi: 英国英格兰爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Bostock于1270年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Edward Phillip De Bostock27岁，母亲Maria de Vernon32岁。他于1305年与Joan De Brereton在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1310年在英国英格兰爾諾維其被列为purveyor for the king。他去世于1338年在英国爾保斯托享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bostock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bostock in Cheshire (Botestoch in Domesday Book), so named with an Old English personal name Bōta (see Bott ) + Old English stoc ‘place’.

variants.name: Bostwick
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northwestern England perhaps a variant of Bostock , and in southeastern England a variant of Bastick (see Bostick 1) with rounding of the vowel.

variants.name: Bott
meanings: English: nickname from Old French bot ‘toad’ (compare Bottrell ). Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Botte (a survival of Old English Botta). Compare Botting .
South German: occupational name for a messenger, from Middle High German bote ‘messenger, emissary’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Bostock was born in 1270, in Cheshire, England, his father, Edward Phillip De Bostock, was 27 and his mother, Maria de Vernon, was 32. He married Joan De Brereton in 1305, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1310, at the age of 40, his occupation is listed as purveyor for the king in Northwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1338, in Bostock, Cheshire, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Bostock est né en 1270, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward Phillip De Bostock, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Maria de Vernon, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Joan De Brereton en 1305, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1310, à l’âge de 40 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est purveyor for the king à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1338, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Bostock 1270 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Phillip De Bostock 27 und seine Mutter Maria de Vernon 32. Er hat 1305 in England Joan De Brereton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1310, als er 40 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als purveyor for the king in Northwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1338 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Bostock, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Bostock è nato il nel 1270 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Edward Phillip De Bostock, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Maria de Vernon, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Joan De Brereton nel 1305, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1310, all'età di 40 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come purveyor for the king nel Northwich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1338, nel Bostock, Cheshire, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Bostockが1270年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Edward Phillip De Bostockは27歳，母Maria de Vernonは32歳であった。1305年にイギリスでJoan De Breretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1310年，40歳の時，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチでの職業はpurveyor for the kingと記録されている。彼は1338年にイギリスチェシュアイアボストックで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Bostock(이)가 1270년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Phillip De Bostock(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria de Vernon(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1305년 영국에서 Joan De Brereton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1310년, 40세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르스위치에서 purveyor for the king이었다. 그는 1338년 영국 체실르 보스톡에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Bostock nasceu em 1270, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Phillip De Bostock, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Maria de Vernon, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan De Brereton em 1305, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1310, com 40 anos, sua profissão aparece como purveyor for the king em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1338, em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Bostock родился в 1270 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward Phillip De Bostock было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria de Vernon, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan De Brereton в 1305 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1310 году, в возрасте 40 лет,  он работал по профессии purveyor for the king в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1338 г. в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Bostock nació en 1270, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward Phillip De Bostock, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Maria de Vernon, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Joan De Brereton en 1305, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1310, a la edad de 40 años, su ocupación registrada era purveyor for the king en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1338, en Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
